name: NVMe Storage Node
description: Ubuntu 22.04 with NVMe P4510 formatted ext4 and mounted at /mnt/nvme. Add an NVME_P4510 component to the node.

commands.command: NVME_DEV=$(lsblk -d -n -o NAME | grep nvme | head -1) && [ -n "$NVME_DEV" ] && sudo mkfs.ext4 /dev/$NVME_DEV
NVME_DEV=$(lsblk -d -n -o NAME | grep nvme | head -1) && [ -n "$NVME_DEV" ] && sudo mkdir -p /mnt/nvme && sudo mount /dev/$NVME_DEV /mnt/nvme && sudo chown $(whoami):$(whoami) /mnt/nvme
